statuses.answered: Recognized self-knowledge request answered from verified evidence; model bypass required.
statuses.clarification_required: Supported request is ambiguous or incomplete; deterministic clarification returned; model bypass required.
statuses.evidence_error: Positive self-knowledge recognition failed evidence verification; fail closed with no ordinary-chat fallback.
statuses.pass_through: Unsupported ordinary chat; adapter does not read the registry and existing chat/model path remains available.
